name: Coffee Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt.
3. Add the oil, eggs, coffee, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients. Mix until well combined.
4. Fold in the sliced apples and chopped nuts.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking pan.
6. Bake for 60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
7. Turn off the oven and let the cake cool inside with the door closed for 10-15 minutes before removing it from the pan.
